goal: Ship v8.7 Approval Authenticity and Adapter Capability Alignment.
risk: AOF could treat approval-shaped evidence as permission for external write even when the adapter is read-only or the human approval is not authentic.
loss_boundary: No v8.7 release claim unless external-write approval requires adapter capability, independent human approval, concrete target, credential scope, budget, rollback, and stop boundaries.
acceptance_gates: human-approval-record writes independent human approval evidence
provider-execution-approval-audit rejects read-only adapter external-write overclaims
v8.6 overclaim is corrected to blocked/read-only on main
evidence_plan: approval authenticity docs, target record, human approval record, approval audit, focused tests, release-state audit, Council review
stop_conditions: stop if Council review is treated as human approval
stop if read-only adapter can authorize external_write
stop if production execution safety is implied
